description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat and slightly sloped roof, featuring extensive use of glass for windows and balcony railings. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, with several outdoor terraces and balconies, some of which are furnished with patio furniture. The exterior walls are finished in a mix of light gray and beige materials, complemented by blue-tinted glass and white trim. The property is landscaped with green lawns, paved walkways, and a variety of trees and shrubs, including flowering and evergreen species. There is a visible garage or carport area, as well as a rooftop deck and multiple staircases connecting different levels. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with flat and sloped roofs, large glass windows, multiple balconies, and landscaped surroundings featuring trees and lawns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, two prominent balconies, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircases, rooftop deck, and a mix of outdoor terraces and green space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage/carport, patio area with furniture, and additional balconies and windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the main terrace, glass railings, and a variety of trees and shrubs around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass balcony railings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, a modern door, and a small overhang, flanked by large windows and minimal decorative elements.
